name: HungerAlert
description: Automatically warns players in chat when their hunger is critically low, reminding them to eat before they stop regenerating health.

name: StormWatch
description: StormWatch automatically warns players when rain is about to begin or end, giving them time to prepare — seek shelter, light torches before mobs spawn, or head outside to farm crops and fill water sources.

name: NightOwl
description: NightOwl automatically warns players as night approaches and tracks hostile mob danger by monitoring the world time, giving you a heads-up to get indoors, light up your base, or gear up before darkness falls. Never get caught off-guard by nighttime again!

name: LootPing
description: LootPing automatically announces to the server whenever a player finds a rare or valuable item in a chest, rewarding exciting discoveries and sparking lively conversation. Never let a legendary loot moment go unnoticed again!

name: DeathMemo
description: DeathMemo privately reminds you exactly where you died and what caused it the next time you log in or respawn, so you never lose track of your grave and can confidently recover your lost items.
